title: Poisons Origins
description: A Simple Origins Addon adding more Races (WIP)
body:
A Small Collection of Origins (Right now just one)
Every week i will add One More, Requests are welcome in the discord

Origins:
Spider Monarch:

- Spiders dont attack you
- Summon Cobwebs around yourself to build your nest or protect yourself
- Cobwebs dont slow you down
- You can Interact through cobwebs (You can break them while sneaking)
- Prey caught in cobwebs glows
- You Apply a Lethal Poison on hit, Capable of killing most foes
- You can Climb up walls!
- You can see in the dark
- Due to your Reliance on your Poison your actual damage is fairly low
- You are Extremely flammable
- the Sun Blinds your 8 eyes
